CustomField.formula: if(ispickval( Degree_of_Urgency__c,"High. Prospect must buy this month"),30,if(ispickval( Degree_of_Urgency__c,"Medium. Prospect will likely buy this month"),20,if(ispickval( Degree_of_Urgency__c,"Low. Prospect may decide to buy now"),10,if(ispickval( Degree_of_Urgency__c,"No sense of urgency to buy now"),0,0))))
CustomField.label: DegreeUrgencyNum
